title: Ansible Role Dependency Galaxy Install Failures in CI
dataSources: CI logs from Ansible Galaxy installs during pipeline (`gitlab:pipeline` job logs) or controller `ansible:log`
app: GitLab CI / GitHub Actions exporting build logs to Splunk
spl:
index=iac sourcetype="gitlab:pipeline" OR sourcetype="ansible:log"
| search "galaxy" AND ("install" OR "requirements") AND ("HTTP" OR "error" OR "failed")
| stats count by project_path, playbook
| sort -count
description: Failed role downloads break immutable build artifacts and supply chain pinning.
value: Surfaces Galaxy or private automation hub outages affecting pipelines.
implementation: Hash `requirements.yml` in events; alert when the same hash fails repeatedly.

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)
